Dubai’s Roads and Transport Authority (RTA) has confirmed the full operational readiness of air-conditioned rest areas for delivery riders ahead of the summer season. The project forms part of RTA’s efforts to enhance traffic safety, reduce accident risks, improve riders’ quality of life, and encourage compliance with traffic laws and regulations.

Hamdan bin Mohammed: Today, I attended the graduation ceremony of the 13th cohort of the National Defence College in Abu Dhabi. Congratulations to the graduates and their families. The college plays a vital role in developing national talent through specialised programmes that build strategic capabilities and contribute to strengthening national security. Investing in Emirati talent is key to sustaining development, protecting our achievements, and preparing for the future.
